title: Luxembourg women's national ice hockey team
summary: The Luxembourg women's national ice hockey team is the national women's ice hockey team of Luxembourg. It is controlled by the Luxembourg Ice Hockey Federation and a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The participated in its first international event at the 2022 IIHF Women's Development Cup held in Kuwait City, winning the bronze medal.
text:
The Luxembourg women's national ice hockey team is the national women's ice hockey team of Luxembourg. It is controlled by the Luxembourg Ice Hockey Federation and a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The participated in its first international event at the 2022 IIHF Women's Development Cup held in Kuwait City, winning the bronze medal.

International competitions
IIHF Women's Development Cup
